summary: Completed comprehensive testing of User Authentication & Activity Tracking features. All backend tests (22/22) passed. All frontend UI tests passed. New features verified: login system, user registration, online status tracking, activity logging, invoice refund/uncancel/delete operations.
passed_tests: ✅ User registration - create new staff user
✅ Get all users with online status
✅ Invoice shows creator's name (User field on print view)
✅ Activity log records invoice actions (create, cancel, refund, delete, uncancel)
✅ UI: Login page loads and form works
✅ UI: Dashboard shows online status indicator in sidebar
✅ UI: Team page shows users with online/offline status
✅ UI: Activity Log tab shows login/logout/invoice events
✅ UI: Add User dialog creates new users
✅ UI: Invoices page shows correct status badges (Pending, Paid, Cancelled, Refunded)
✅ UI: Invoice actions menu shows context-appropriate options
✅ UI: Invoice print view shows 'User: Admin' creator name
✅ UI: Logout redirects to login page
seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing with 'TEST_' prefix and unique timestamps
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new user auth features tested and working: 1) Login system with admin/timeless532002, 2) User registration via Team page, 3) Online status indicators showing in sidebar and Team page, 4) Activity log records all actions (login, logout, create_invoice, cancel_invoice, delete_invoice, refund_invoice, uncancel_invoice), 5) Invoice print view shows creator name as 'User: Admin', 6) Refund/Uncancel/Delete invoice operations require password 19752, 7) Protected routes redirect to login. Previous iteration tests (iteration_2.json) for invoice features remain valid.

features_tested.user_registration: Working - can create new staff users via Team page
features_tested.online_status: Working - green dot for online users, 'Online now' vs 'Never' labels
features_tested.activity_log: Working - shows login/logout/invoice actions with timestamps and usernames
features_tested.invoice_creator_tracking: Working - invoices show 'User: Admin' on print view
features_tested.invoice_refund: Working - requires password 19752, changes status to 'Refunded'
features_tested.invoice_cancel: Working - requires password 19752, changes status to 'Cancelled'
features_tested.invoice_uncancel: Working - requires password 19752, restores to 'Pending' status
features_tested.invoice_delete: Working - requires password 19752, permanently removes invoice
features_tested.logout: Working - invalidates session, redirects to login page
features_tested.protected_routes: Working - unauthenticated requests redirected to login
